nasb.text: Your ears will hear a word behind you, “This is the way, walk in it,” whenever you turn to the right or to the left.

esv.text: And your ears shall hear a word behind you, saying, “This is the way, walk in it,” when you turn to the right or when you turn to the left.

cnv.text: 每當你偏左或偏右的時候，你必聽見後面有聲音說：“這是正路，要行在其中！”

ccb.text: 不管你们向左还是向右，都会听见背后有声音说：“这是正路，踏上去吧！”

csbs.text: 你或向左或向右，都必听见后面有声音说：“这是正路，要行在其中！”
